description: This checked shirt from scullers adds a big dose of style to your formal look. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this shirt, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with formal trousers and formal footwear.Product DetailsBlue checked shirt made of 100% combed cotton, has a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and print, full front buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem  Material and Care100% combed cottonHand or machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry lowDry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitSlim fitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size 39
